The '''Makem system''' was a seven-[[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] [[Star system/Legends|system]] that contained the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Makem Te/Legends|Makem Te]]. It was in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]], along the [[Perlemian Trade Route/Legends|Perlemian Trade Route]]. A [[Battle of the Makem system (Mandalorian Wars)|battle]] of the [[Mandalorian Wars]] was fought here.<ref name="TEA" />

{{System-stub}}
